hooks.command:
jq -r '(.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path) // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && [ "$f" != "null" ] || exit 0; case "${f##*.}" in php) out=$(vendor/bin/rector process "$f" --no-progress-bar 2>/dev/null); status=$?; printf '%s
' "$out" | grep -vE '^$|WARNING.*Skipped rule' || true; exit $status;; md|yml|yaml|json|html) npx -q prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null;; esac; }

jq -r '(.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path) // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && [ "$f" != "null" ] || exit 0; case "${f##*.}" in php) vendor/bin/phpstan analyse "$f" --no-progress --error-format=raw 2>/dev/null | head -20;; esac; }
